subcodes.first_line: O thou who extolleth the Lord! Open thine eyes and unseal thy vision, that thou mayest behold the effulgent revelations of the Abhá Beauty from the Kingdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناطق بثنای پروردگار چشم بگشا و دیده باز کن تا تجلیات جمال ابهی را از ملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
